name: Antler Gold Inc.
summary: Antler Gold Inc. engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in Canada. The company explores for gold, silver, arsenic, copper, molybdenum, and other deposits. It holds interest in the Erongo Gold project comprising 5 licenses under option and 5 under application that covers an area of approximately 85,341 hectares located in central Namibia. The company was formerly known as Northwest Arm Capital Inc. and changed its name to Antler Gold Inc. in January 2017. Antler Gold Inc. was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Halifax, Canada.
